summary:
**arXiv cs.AI** — Recent submissions
- [Efficient MoE Inference for Long Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.01234) — Faster decoding via expert caching + quantization-aware routing.
- [Safety Benchmarks for Agentic LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.04567) — A jailbreak + tool-use eval suite with reproducible scoring.
- [A Small Multimodal Dataset for Robot Grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.07890) — New dataset + baseline for grasp success prediction.

**Hugging Face Papers** — Trending
- [Efficient MoE Inference for Long Context](https://huggingface.co/papers/2503.01234) — Trending today on HF Papers.

**OpenReview ICLR 2026** — No new significant submissions in the last 24 hours.
